metadata.description: Official German travel-warning intelligence skills powered by the reisewarnungen-cli (Auswärtiges Amt travel-warning API)

plugins.name: reisewarnungen
plugins.description: Brief the German Foreign Office's travel and safety advice for a trip, rank every country currently under a warning, and diff warnings over time — all over the open, key-free Auswärtiges Amt travel-warning API via the reisewarnungen-cli.
